ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the feature */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the data point belongs to */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the data point measures */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the data point represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "error_margin" REAL /* Error margin of the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_features" (
  "project_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-feature mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature in the context of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project-feature mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-metric mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric in the context of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project-metric mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the changes made in this version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data point */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the changes made in this version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data point version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaborator's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaborator's involvement */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
